_provenance: Metatile ids are from vanilla pokeemerald gTileset_General (primary, shared). Terrain fills verified against PetalburgCity/Route101/Route103 layouts; the water `edges` rocky-bank set (ids 176-218) was identified by metatile water-behavior bytes in data/tilesets/primary/general/metatile_attributes.bin and validated by rendering candidate ponds (see scratchpad pond2/pond3). Water has no grass-direct shoreline in vanilla; it banks with rock, hence the bank ring. Edge keys: N/E/S/W sides, NW/NE/SW/SE outer corners, fill interior. Inner (concave) corners fall back to fill in v1.
